## Summary

<!-- One-paragraph description of what this PR changes and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Performance improvement (`perf:`)
- [ ] Refactor / chore / docs (no release bump)
- [ ] Breaking change (`!:` or `BREAKING CHANGE:` in body)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for behavior changes (regression test for bug fixes).
- [ ] `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` / `pnpm lint` clean.
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` / `pnpm typecheck` clean.
- [ ] Conventional Commit prefix on the squash-merge title.
- [ ] Docs updated (README / CONTRIBUTING / RELEASING) if user-visible behavior changed.
- [ ] Envelope updated (planned_sha, scope_boundary, verification_cmd) if this PR resolves a Clawket task with an envelope contract.

## Risk

<!-- What could go wrong? Migrations, backwards-compat, blast radius. -->
